---
title: "Economic Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial patterns of economic activities, production, and resource distribution."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

Welcome to the **Economic Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores how economic activities — primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary — are distributed across space and how location, resources, and human decisions shape economic landscapes.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Factors affecting spatial organisation of economic activities (primary, secondary, tertiary and quarternary).**
* **Natural Resources (classification, distribution and associated problems), Natural Resources Management.**
* **World Energy Crises in Developed and Developing Countries.**

---


{{< include economic-geography/_course-content.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/_fundamentals-of-economic-geography.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/_primary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/_secondary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/_tertiary-quaternary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/_location-theories.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/_globalization-economic-space.md >}}
